duration_breakdown_note: 97.7 min wall — DOMINATED by cold @triton.autotune sweep. Conv2d alone has ~13 unique shapes × 18 configs = 234 compile+bench cycles, plus mm/addmm/baddbmm sweeps. Persistent disk cache via cache_results=True writes ~/.triton/cache/<hash>/<fn>.autotune.json — second run is hot from disk and reverts to ~100 s baseline (Phase 1.5 measurement: cache_run2 ≈ cache_run3 ≈ 101 s ± 7%).
verdict: PASS_VISUAL_AGENT (red apple coherent, glossy, deep red on warm gradient — comparable to compiled output_compiled.png)
regression_check_vs_pre_phase15: Wall-clock cold +5760 s (autotune sweep); hot path (post-cache) projected 100 s ± noise — non-regression on warm path. Correctness preserved.
